courses.name: Indigenous Health
courses.description: Learners will review the Calls to Action of the Truth and Reconciliation Commission of Canada and begin to understand their role in transforming health systems and addressing Indigenous specific racism through theory and practice.
courses.prerequisites: restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing students.

courses.name: Professional Nursing I
courses.description: Introduction to professional nursing practice. Develops understanding and application of key principles essential for professional identity as a Registered Nurse, including self-regulation, accountability, ethical conduct, and professional integrity.
courses.prerequisites: restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing students.

courses.name: Human Anatomy and Physiology I
courses.description: Comprehensive understanding of human body structure and function, emphasizing nursing and health assessment focus from cells to systems.
courses.prerequisites: restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Adult Health and Illness I
courses.description: Foundational skills in patient management and human physical assessment for effective nursing care, focusing on patient-centered approaches, ethical decision-making, and interprofessional teamwork.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 1001 , NURS 1002 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Pharmacology and Medication Management I
courses.description: In-depth exploration of pharmacology for nursing. Covers drug effects, patient care roles, and practical application, guided by the CNO Foundational Standard, Medication.
courses.prerequisites: restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Experiential Learning - Simulation I
courses.description: Connects theory with augmented reality, virtual reality, and simulation applications. Topics include patient management, protective equipment, and assessment techniques.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 1004 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Clinical Practicum – Long-Term Care
courses.description: Clinical practicum introducing healthcare environment, focusing on applying theoretical nursing knowledge, policy understanding, and practice in an interdisciplinary context. Graded SAT/UNS.
courses.prerequisites: restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Clinical Practicum - Chronic Care
courses.description: Clinical practicum on chronic illness care, integrating theoretical knowledge with practical skills in assessment, documentation, and medication administration. Graded SAT/UNS.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 1001 , NURS 1002 , and NURS 1200 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Community Health
courses.description: Introduction to nursing community support systems, focusing on Ontario-based community care delivery models, harm reduction, epidemiology and navigating healthcare systems. Covers well child promotion and immunization.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 1003 , NURS  1100. Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Professional Nursing II
courses.description: Builds on , moves from understanding general role of a Registered Nurse to personal identity as a Registered Nurse. Incorporates Quality Assurance, Safety and Harm mitigation principals.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 1001 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Human Anatomy and Physiology II
courses.description: Advanced course on human anatomy and physiology, focusing on complex body system interactions and pathophysiology.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 1002 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Adult Health and Illness II
courses.description: Advances from , integrates complex patient care management and systems focus, pharmacology, and consolidated nursing practice knowledge.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 1003 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Pharmacology and Medication Management II
courses.description: Deepens pharmacological knowledge and skills, focusing on complex aspects of pharmacology and its application in nursing practice. Introduces RN Prescribing.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 1004 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Health Equity and Social Justice
courses.description: Develops understanding of social determinants of health and their impact on health outcomes. Reviews specific populations to understand health beyond physiology.
courses.prerequisites: restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Resilience Training
courses.description: Explores resilience, grit, and psychological safety in nursing, focusing on thriving under stress, reflecting on the COVID-19 pandemic's impact, and developing personal resilience strategies.
courses.prerequisites: restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Interpersonal Communication
courses.description: Focuses on introduction and development of effective communication strategies in healthcare, including therapeutic, inter-professional, closed loop, conflict resolution and feedback skills.
courses.prerequisites: restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Mental Health
courses.description: Introduces Mental Health Nursing in Ontario, covering disease, diagnosis, care plans, pharmacological management, DSM-IV, and The Mental Health Act.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 1003 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Introduction to Health IT
courses.description: Introduces clinical informatics and health IT, covering coding, data management, electronic health records (EHRs), telehealth, wearables, and the impact of social determinants on technology access and usability.
courses.prerequisites: restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Data Management and Advanced Data Analytics in Healthcare
courses.description: Advanced data analytics and management in healthcare, including predictive modelling, statistical analysis, and constructing data mining workflows.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 2016 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Designing and Deploying Technology Enabled Clinical Workflows
courses.description: Techniques for integrating technology into clinical workflows, focusing on wearables, AI tools, and technology deployment challenges.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 2016 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Healthcare Technology Evaluation, Procurement and Project Management
courses.description: Evaluation, procurement, and project management of healthcare technologies, focusing on AI-specific metrics and implementation strategies.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 2016 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Ethics, Legalities and Regulation in Healthcare Data Science
courses.description: Ethical, legal, and regulatory frameworks around AI and data security in healthcare, examining technology's impact on access and ethical deployment.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 2016 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Experiential Learning - Simulation II
courses.description: Expands on with more complex patient management scenarios, using augmented reality, virtual reality, and simulation.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 1100 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Experiential Learning - Simulation III
courses.description: Advanced simulation lab, focusing on complex patient management and health assessment in various clinical scenarios.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 2100 , NURS 2014 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Clinical Practicum - Mental Health & Obstetrics
courses.description: Clinical practicum in mental health and maternal/child care, integrating complex assessments, documentation, and medication administration. Graded SAT/UNS.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 1201 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Clinical Practicum - Acute Care
courses.description: Clinical practicum in acute illness care, applying advanced theoretical knowledge and practice in rapidly changing clinical scenarios. Graded SAT/UNS.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 1002 , NURS 1003 , NURS 1004 , NURS 2001 and NURS 2200 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Research Methods for Nurses
courses.description: Explores research methodologies essential for evidence-based nursing practice, aiming to equip students with critical analysis, research ethics, and independent research skills.
courses.prerequisites: restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Professional Nursing III
courses.description: Continued understanding of professional identity in a regulated profession. Incorporates role of leadership, advocacy and educator.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 2001 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Directed Studies - NCLEX
courses.description: Directed studies integrating material from throughout the program in preparation for NCLEX exam writing.
courses.prerequisites: restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Pediatrics and Youth
courses.description: Pediatrics and youth healthcare, covering physical, psychological, and social assessment, and family healthcare.
courses.prerequisites: restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Palliative and End of Life Care
courses.description: Comprehensive course on palliative and end-of-life care, covering symptom management, advanced care planning, MAiD and ethical considerations.
courses.prerequisites: restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Maternal Care
courses.description: Care for maternal and newborn health, including lactation support, childbirth practices, and family healthcare assessment.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 2002 , NURS 2003 , NURS 2004 , and NURS 2200 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Introduction to AI and ML in Healthcare
courses.description: Fundamentals of AI and ML in healthcare, covering data classification, mining, ethical data use, and exploring AI/ML architectures.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 2016 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Seminar - Nursing Data Science
courses.description: Seminars and discussions on current Nursing Data Science topics.
courses.prerequisites: third-year standing in the Nursing program. Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Experiential Learning - Consolidation Simulation IV
courses.description: Consolidated simulation lab for complex clinical scenario practice, supporting final clinical practicum preparation.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 2108 , NURS 3200 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Experiential Learning - Consolidation Simulation V
courses.description: Consolidated simulation lab for complex clinical scenario practice, supporting final clinical practicum preparation.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 3100 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Clinical Practicum - Pediatrics
courses.description: Clinical practicum in pediatrics, focusing on complex care, assessments, and integrating pediatric healthcare principles. Graded SAT/UNS.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 2201 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Clinical Practicum - Consolidated Practicum I
courses.description: Students complete clinical placement to consolidate theory and application to advance toward graduation. Graded SAT/UNS.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 3200 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Topics in Nursing I
courses.description: Specific topics of current interest. Topics may vary from year to year.
courses.prerequisites: Third-year standing in the Nursing program. Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Topics in Nursing II
courses.description: Specific topics of current interest. Topics may vary from year to year.
courses.prerequisites: Third-year standing in the Nursing program. Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Nursing Research Project
courses.description: An independent research project undertaken in the field and/or the laboratory, under the direct supervision of a faculty adviser. Evaluation is based on a written thesis.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 3000 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing Honours students.

courses.name: Nursing Research Proposal
courses.description: An independent critical review and research proposal, using library resources, under the direct  supervision of a Faculty advisor. Evaluation is based on a written report.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 3000 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Experiential Learning - Improving Nursing
courses.description: Seminars on current issues in Nursing.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 3000 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

courses.name: Clinical Practicum - Consolidated Practicum II
courses.description: Students complete clinical placement to consolidate theory and application to advance toward graduation. Graded SAT/UNS.
courses.prerequisites: NURS 3201 , NURS 3101 . Restricted to Bachelor of Science in Nursing with RN Prescribing students.

free_electives.degree: Nursing B.Sc.N. Honours with RN Prescribing (20.0 credits)
Nursing B.Sc.N. Major with RN Prescribing (20.0 credits)
free_electives.text: 5.  3.5 credits in free electives (may include NURS 4012 & NURS 4112 ) 3.5
